title: Moliniopsis nipponica
taxonomy: Moliniopsis nipponica is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It is native to East Asia and is often found in mountainous regions. As a member of the Poaceae family, Moliniopsis nipponica is classified as a type of grass. Further classification places it in the subfamily Pooideae and tribe Poeae. Within the Poeae tribe, Moliniopsis nipponica is likely to be a part of the subtribe Poinae.
